sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَتْ أُمُّ لَيْلَى لَهَا حَقِيبَةً مَدْرَسِيَّةً جَدِيدَةً.
sentences.translation: Lejlina mama joj je kupila novu školsku torbu.
sentences.translationEn: Layla's mother bought her a new school bag.

sentences.translation: Torba je bila plava i lijepa.
sentences.translationEn: The bag was blue and beautiful.

sentences.arabic: وَضَعَتْ لَيْلَى كُتُبَهَا وَأَقْلَامَهَا فِي الحَقِيبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Lejla je stavila knjige i olovke u torbu.
sentences.translationEn: Layla put her books and pens in the bag.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ إِلَى المَدْرَسَةِ وَهِيَ تَشْعُرُ بِالفَرَحِ.
sentences.translation: Otišla je u školu osjećajući radost.
sentences.translationEn: She went to school feeling happy.
